title: Past simple: regular and irregular verbs
explanation:
Past simple verbs

Regular verbs: add -ed (work → worked, play → played).

Irregular verbs: special forms (go → went, see → saw, have → had).

Questions and negatives use did / didn't + base verb: Did you go? I didn't see him.

questions.text: They [*didn't enjoy|not enjoy|doesn't enjoy] the film.

questions.feedback: Past question: Did + subject + base verb.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I ____ my keys at home. | *left | leave | leaved
She ____ a new dress. | *bought | buyed | buy
They ____ to music all evening. | *listened | listen | listening

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option to complete the sentences.

questions.text: He [*didn't come|came not|doesn't come] to the meeting.
